description: i t P 7 f x MYfy Aft 1 tT flVH I Chickasha Indian Territory Wednesday Evening August 16 1905 NUMBER 194 I IltS BE SI WI 1 160 acres Fine Washita Valley Land for Rent All in good cultivation and adjoining the city I r TO TTtl 1 I 4 v it BUSINESS UN OPPOSE SEPARATE STATEHOOD MOVEMENT THEY ARE UNITED IN FAVOR OF SINGLE STATEHOOD MB OWEN NOT SINCERE In Hif Advocacy of the Separate Slate Plan Hit Record Delegate B S McGuire is re ceiving many letters from business men and politicians in Indian Ter ritory declaring their hostility to the separate statehood convention to be held iu Muskogee under the leadership of Robert L Owen and others interested in tribal schemes Delegate McGuires correspondents assure him that regardless of all claims to the contrary the business interests of Indian Territory fayor joint statehood They say the joint statehood men in Indian Ter ritory will send a strong delegation to Washington next winter to aid him in his battle for one big state In many of the letters received by Delegate McGuire Robert L Owen is accused of insincerity iu his separate statehood fight These men insist
